daily_summary.headline: Test Flights and Starlink Deployments Dominate the Day

top_events.title: Firefly Alpha Test Flight
top_events.description: Firefly Alpha's Flight 7 will be a test flight and return-To-Flight for the launch vehicle after its April 2025 launch failure. It will test and validate key systems ahead of Firefly’s Block II configuration upgrade.

top_events.title: KAIROS Flight 3
top_events.description: Third flight of the KAIROS launch vehicle carrying 5 satellites. A significant test for Space One after previous failures.

top_events.title: Aurora Viewing Opportunity
top_events.description: Possible aurora at high latitudes with a Kp index of 4.33. Best for northern locations (65°+).
top_events.action: Check conditions and prepare for photography

opportunities.recommendation: Possible aurora at high latitudes. Best for northern locations (65°+). Worth checking if conditions are optimal.
